introSection: Raupen Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Schwaben Park in Kaisersbach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. It was originally named Crazy Worm from 2003 to 2017.
fullText: Raupen Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Schwaben Park in Kaisersbach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. It was originally named Crazy Worm from 2003 to 2017.
